title: Reviewer Handoff Review Result Report Validation Report
description: Machine-readable report contract emitted by veritas-evidence-bundle validate-review-result-report --json. This schema validates only the validator result shape for a saved validate-review-result --json report. It does not re-run reviewer review, create trust, replace out-of-band public key trust, prove regulatory certification, complete third-party audit approval, or establish cryptographic truth. The report intentionally exposes booleans, fixed schema identifiers, and fixed diagnostics only; it does not expose raw file paths, raw JSON values, raw fingerprints, exception text, raw schema validator messages, secrets, or customer data from the saved report.

ok.description: Overall validate-review-result-report status. True means the saved validate-review-result --json report conformed to its JSON Schema and contained no forbidden sensitive or raw text patterns.

result_schema_valid.description: True when the saved validate-review-result --json report conforms to the reviewer handoff review result validation report schema.

forbidden_patterns_absent.description: True when the saved validate-review-result --json report does not contain forbidden sensitive or raw diagnostic patterns.

validated_schema_id.description: Identifies the saved validate-review-result --json report schema checked by validate-review-result-report.

report_schema_id.description: Identifies this validator result schema. This metadata validates report shape only; it does not re-run reviewer review or establish trust.

validator.description: Identifies the validator command that emitted this report.

errors.description: Fixed public diagnostics for failed saved-report checks. Empty when ok is true.

path.description: Fixed public JSONPath-like location for the failed check.

enum: result file could not be read
result file is not valid JSON
result contains forbidden sensitive or raw text
message.description: Fixed public diagnostic. Raw external values, raw file paths, raw fingerprints, exception text, raw schema validator messages, secrets, customer data, and raw JSON values are not permitted.
